name: Midnight Season 1

source.instanceIdSemantics: IDs are journal instance IDs from wow-instances.json. Split mega-dungeon wings reuse the parent journal instance id and filter encounters by encounter order.

warnings: Midnight is represented by expansionId 516 in wow-expansions.json; expansionId 505 is named Current Season but no uploaded instances reference it.
The uploaded instance named Midnight (id 1312) is typed as raid but its encounters are world bosses, so it is separated into worldBossInstances.
notes: Midnight Season 1 has four raid instances in the uploaded data: The Voidspire, The Dreamrift, March on Quel'Danas, and Sporefall.
The Mythic+ dungeon pool contains four Midnight dungeons and four legacy dungeons.

source.instanceIdSemantics: IDs are journal instance IDs from wow-instances.json. Split mega-dungeon wings reuse the parent journal instance id and filter encounters by encounter order.

warnings: The original uploaded season entry used expansionId 10, but wow-expansions.json uses 514 for The War Within.
The original uploaded season entry referenced raidInstanceIds [1278] (Khaz Algar) and mythicPlusDungeonIds [506, 525], which are not the final journal instance ids for this season.
Operation: Mechagon - Workshop is represented by the full Operation: Mechagon instance in wow-instances.json, so this file keeps parent id 1178 and filters encounters to the four Workshop bosses.
